title: Beef Stroganoff Dumplings
description: A hearty twist on the classic Russian dish, served with fluffy dumplings and a rich beef sauce.

ingredients.name: Dumpling Wrappers
ingredients.notes: usually found in the frozen food section

ingredients.name: Molten Butter
ingredients.notes: melted and separated from the solid butter

instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook the dumpling wrappers according to package instructions.
2. In a large skillet, melt the molten butter over medium-high heat. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
3. Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add the beef broth to the skillet, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens.
6. Stir in the thyme, salt, and pepper.
7. To assemble the dish, place a cooked dumpling on a plate and spoon the beef sauce over the top.
8. Serve with a dollop of sour cream and a sprinkle of chopped chives.
